Interface StockexchangeJpaRepository

All Superinterfaces:
BaseRepositoryCustom<Stockexchange>, org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Stockexchange, Integer>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Stockexchange, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Stockexchange, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Stockexchange, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Stockexchange, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Stockexchange>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Stockexchange, Integer>, StockexchangeJpaRepositoryCustom, UpdateCreateJpaRepository<Stockexchange>
public interface StockexchangeJpaRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Stockexchange, Integer>, StockexchangeJpaRepositoryCustom, UpdateCreateJpaRepository<Stockexchange>

    StockexchangeJpaRepository.IdStockexchangeIndexName
    Projection interface for retrieving a stock exchange’s ID and the name of its calendar‐update index security.

  • Method Details

    • findAllByOrderByNameAsc

      List<Stockexchange> findAllByOrderByNameAsc()

    • findByNoMarketValueFalse

      List<Stockexchange> findByNoMarketValueFalse()

    • findByIdStockexchangeAndNoMarketValueFalse

      Optional<Stockexchange> findByIdStockexchangeAndNoMarketValueFalse(int idStockexchange)

    • findByName

      Stockexchange findByName(String name)

    • findByMic

      Optional<Stockexchange> findByMic(String mic)
      Finds a stock exchange by its Market Identifier Code (MIC).
      Parameters:
      mic - the ISO 10383 Market Identifier Code
      Returns:
      Optional containing the matching Stockexchange, or empty if not found

    • findDistinctCountryCodes

      @Query(value="SELECT DISTINCT s.country_code FROM stockexchange s", nativeQuery=true) String[] findDistinctCountryCodes()

    • updateHistoricalUpdateWithNowForAll

      @UpdateQuery(value="UPDATE stockexchange SET last_direct_price_update = UTC_TIMESTAMP() WHERE no_market_value = 0", nativeQuery=true) void updateHistoricalUpdateWithNowForAll()

    • updateHistoricalUpdateWithNowByIdsStockexchange

      @UpdateQuery(value="UPDATE stockexchange SET last_direct_price_update = UTC_TIMESTAMP() WHERE id_stockexchange IN (?1)", nativeQuery=true) void updateHistoricalUpdateWithNowByIdsStockexchange(List<Integer> ids)

    • getIdStockexchangeAndIndexNameForCalendarUpd

      @Query(nativeQuery=true) List<StockexchangeJpaRepository.IdStockexchangeIndexName> getIdStockexchangeAndIndexNameForCalendarUpd()
      Fetches stock exchange IDs along with the names of their calendar‐update index securities.
      Returns:
      a list of StockexchangeJpaRepository.IdStockexchangeIndexName projections

    • stockexchangeHasSecurity

      @Query(nativeQuery=true) int stockexchangeHasSecurity(Integer idStockexchange)
      Checks whether a specific stock exchange has any associated securities.
      Parameters:
      idStockexchange - the ID of the stock exchange to check
      Returns:
      1 if at least one security exists; 0 otherwise

    • stockexchangesHasSecurity

      @Query(nativeQuery=true) List<StockexchangeHasSecurity> stockexchangesHasSecurity()
      Retrieves all stock exchanges with a flag indicating whether they have any securities.
      Returns:
      a list of StockexchangeHasSecurity projections
